description: AD6 side-effect doctrine lint config (Alembic). Enforces the AD0 doctrine's machine-checkable pattern classes over lib/: (A) module-scope mutable `let` bindings outside the managed-lifecycle idiom (`let _x: T | null = null` accessor slots are the sanctioned shape), and (B) module-scope EMPTY new Map()/new Set() accumulators (literal-seeded const lookups are immutable and exempt by construction). Blessed entries carry owner/reason/cleanupTrigger like the layer contract's exceptions; the lint is blocking in npm run check via scripts/lint-doctrine.mjs.

blessedEntries.reason: Module-scope task id counter predating AD4; not in the P0-census enumerated remediation set. Needs a managed-lifecycle slot or container ownership.
Module-scope wiki generation task state predating AD4; same class as discoverTask. Needs a managed-lifecycle slot.
Module-scope relation-discovery task state predating AD4. Needs a managed-lifecycle slot.
